info.name: Cube API Collection
info.description: Complete Postman collection to test the Cube services via the API Gateway. Explicit headers are defined on each authorized request (no folder inheritance).

query.description: Number of login history records to retrieve

formdata.description: Optional: avatar image file (JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, AVIF — max 5 MB). Server compresses to WebP and uploads to S3.

request.description:
Update the authenticated user's profile.

**Content-Type**: `multipart/form-data`

| Field  | Type   | Required | Notes |
|--------|--------|----------|-------|
| name   | string | No       | 2–100 chars |
| phone  | string | No       | max 20 chars |
| avatar | file   | No       | JPEG/PNG/WebP/GIF/AVIF, max 5 MB. Compressed to WebP + uploaded to S3. Old avatar auto-deleted. |

At least one field must be present.

query.description: Fuzzy and wildcard search query for name, email, or phone
Filter by role (ADMIN, MANAGER, SUPPORT, CUSTOMER)
Filter by status (ACTIVE, PENDING, LOCKED, DELETED)

item.name: Get Single User by ID (User Service Gateway)
Get Single User by ID (Direct Auth Service)

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Samsung",
  "description": "Electronics and technology giant",
  "logoUrl": "https://example.com/samsung-logo.png",
  "website": "https://samsung.com",
  "seoTitle": "Samsung Products",
  "seoDesc": "Buy authentic Samsung electronics"
}

formdata.description: Optional: brand logo image (JPEG/PNG/WebP/GIF/AVIF, max 5 MB). Compressed to WebP and uploaded to S3. Old logo auto-deleted.

request.description:
Update a brand's metadata and/or logo in a single request.

**Content-Type**: `multipart/form-data`

| Field       | Type   | Required | Notes |
|-------------|--------|----------|-------|
| name        | string | No       | Brand display name |
| description | string | No       | Short description |
| website     | string | No       | Brand website URL |
| seoTitle    | string | No       | SEO title |
| seoDesc     | string | No       | SEO description |
| logo        | file   | No       | JPEG/PNG/WebP/GIF/AVIF, max 5 MB. Compressed to WebP + uploaded to S3. Old logo auto-deleted. |

At least one field must be present.

formdata.description: Brand logo image file (JPEG/PNG/WebP, max 5 MB)
Optional: parent category ID (send empty string to remove parent / make root)
Optional: category icon image (JPEG/PNG/WebP/GIF/AVIF, max 5 MB). Compressed to WebP and uploaded to S3. Old icon auto-deleted.

request.description:
Update a category's metadata and/or icon in a single request.

**Content-Type**: `multipart/form-data`

| Field    | Type   | Required | Notes |
|----------|--------|----------|-------|
| name     | string | No       | Category display name |
| parentId | string | No       | Parent category ID. Send empty string to make root-level. |
| icon     | file   | No       | JPEG/PNG/WebP/GIF/AVIF, max 5 MB. Compressed to WebP + uploaded to S3. Old icon auto-deleted. |

At least one field must be present.
